observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with drying stress
Visual pattern suggesting linear crack on capsule surface
Localized deviation from normal capsule appearance
mechanism_explanation: Moisture loss during drying creates internal stresses that exceed material cohesion.
severity_visual_description: critical linear crack on capsule surface visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Reduce drying rate and control ambient humidity.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the linear crack on capsule surface would be absent and surface appears normal.
